name: Reasonable Compensation for Trust Services

eligibility.description: Services must be reasonable and necessary to carry out the exempt purpose of the 501(c)(21) trust and compensation must not be excessive.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Payment of reasonable and necessary compensation to a disqualified person for personal services rendered to a Black Lung Benefit Trust is not treated as prohibited self-dealing.
